reviewer: agent build+matrix pass (headless Chrome real download+run on WASM, standalone inference cross-check, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — revision 1

rubric.evidence: REAL in-browser run (headless Chrome, WASM, fresh profile → 'Download model (~310 MB)' → click → auto-run): the model embedded the mixed EN/FR/JA/ES/DE default passages and rendered a 768-d cross-language cosine matrix (496 ms): diagonal 1.00, EN battery sentence ↔ FR battery paraphrase 0.91, ↔ refund-policy lines ~0.5, ↔ unrelated 0.12; 0 console errors, 0 network failures. Standalone browser cross-check (Snowflake/snowflake-arctic-embed-m-v2.0, q8, WASM, cls pooling): EN-paraphrase 0.776, EN↔ES translation 0.739, unrelated 0.230 — related >> unrelated with strong cross-lingual similarity.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified real WASM embeddings on the actual page; sensible cosine ranking (related > cross-lingual > unrelated).

rubric.evidence: feature-extraction dense head → 768-dimensional vectors (confirmed rDim=768 on the page and dim=768 in the standalone run). CLS pooling then L2-normalize → unit vectors, so cosine is a dot product. Cross-lingual paraphrases land ~0.7–0.9, unrelated < 0.4 — semantically correct.

At-a-glance declares the exact model id (Snowflake/snowflake-arctic-embed-m-v2.0, linked), task (feature-extraction dense head), architecture (GTE-multilingual backbone, model_type 'gte', ~305M), 768-d, ~50 languages, 8192-token context, Matryoshka (MRL), CLS pooling + 'query: ' retrieval prefix, backend (WebAssembly), quantisation (q8). Inference runs in a module Web Worker (models/arctic-embed-v2/worker.js). Distinct from the built arctic-embed-s (v1, English, BERT, 384-d) — stated explicitly.
rubric.notes: Distinctness from the built arctic-embed-s documented; gte backbone confirmed loadable in transformers.js 3.7.5.

rubric.evidence: Loads through the shared createModelLoader auto-init architecture (no hand-rolled Load button). Headless fresh profile showed 'Download model (~310 MB)'; after the click it auto-loaded to state=ready and auto-ran the default embed. The same shared loader provides cached auto-init, per-model 'Clear cached model' and storage readout across all built demos.
rubric.notes: Fresh-profile Download + auto-init-to-ready verified on the real page.

rubric.evidence: A role=status aria-live #rowStatus region reports 'Embedding…' / 'Done.' / errors; the shared loader streams download progress and offers Retry on failure; the WASM path works offline once cached. Failures surface on the page ('Embedding failed: …'), not only the console. The multi-model page loads the second model (M2M100) on demand with its own loader + status.
rubric.notes: Runs on WASM — no WebGPU required; degrades honestly.

rubric.evidence: Passages textarea, Embed button, Reset, cross-lingual search query + Search, the inspect-passage <select>, and the Matryoshka truncation range slider are all real, labelled, keyboard-operable. Sub-pages add A/B compare + example chips (basics), language-preset chips (practical), a Matryoshka width slider driving live re-ranking (wild), and a two-model translate flow (multi-model). The matrix, PCA projection, ranked search and per-dimension vector strip all render from the real run.

The cosine matrix, PCA projection, search ranking, per-dimension vector strip and Matryoshka self-cosine are all computed from the on-device embeddings (verified real output above). The language flag/badge is a clearly-labelled heuristic guesser for the UI only, never the model's output. No canned result.
rubric.notes: Language guesser labelled as UI-only heuristic, not model output.

rubric.evidence: Buttons and the range slider expose accessible names; textarea/input/select have associated labels; state announced via role=status aria-live; the PCA SVG has role=img + aria-label. No content images without alt (canvas/SVG/table only). Scoped overflow-wrap:anywhere on the at-a-glance table so long ids wrap.

Browser matrix (scripts/responsive-check.mjs): desktop (1280×800) and mobile (360×740 DPR3) both measured 0px horizontal overflow, no clipped controls, clean console + network. Screenshots reviewed: desktop (dark) + mobile (light) of the main page — the at-a-glance table wraps the long model id, the similarity matrix scrolls in its own overflow-x:auto container, the grid-2 layout collapses to one column on mobile. Sub-pages share the identical shell/CSS.
rubric.notes: Programmatic 0px on both classes; main-page light+dark reviewed.

rubric.evidence: All embedding inference runs in a module Web Worker; the client-side maths (cosine, PCA, k-means, Matryoshka truncation) runs on a handful of already-computed 768-d vectors, cheap enough for the main thread. Embed of 7 passages took 496 ms on WASM. 0 console errors during the run.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Offload / break up long main-thread tasks so the browser can paint and respond.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — all embedding inference runs in a module Web Worker (new Worker(workerUrl,{type:'module'})); only the light post-hoc maths over a few vectors runs on the main thread.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: models/arctic-embed-v2/worker.js runs the model; arctic.js does the cheap maths; page run had 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep heavy JS off the interaction path so INP stays low.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — embed/search post to the worker and await; the Matryoshka slider only re-computes dot products over cached vectors (no re-embedding), so dragging it stays responsive.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: wild-page slider recomputes truncated cosines client-side over cached embeddings

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid grids that wrap; avoid fixed widths; wide content scrolls in its own container; long unbreakable tokens must wrap so tables don't force page overflow.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — .grid-2 uses grid repeat(auto-fit,minmax(300px,1fr)) and collapses to one column on mobile; .matrix-scroll wraps the similarity table in overflow-x:auto; scoped .inside-table { overflow-wrap:anywhere } wraps the long model id.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-check measured 0px overflow on desktop + mobile

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Control the clipping/overflow boundary so wide content (the matrix) doesn't spill the layout.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the n×n similarity matrix scrolls inside its own .matrix-scroll container rather than widening the page; the code sample scrolls inside its <pre>.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: no clipped controls flagged at either viewport

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Accessible form controls with clear, associated labels.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — passages textarea, query input, inspect <select> and the Matryoshka range slider all have associated labels; Embed/Search/Reset are real buttons; Enter searches.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: run-panel + see-inside markup; conformance buttons-have-names derives as pass

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label controls; announce state in a live region; give the projection an accessible name; landmarks + heading order.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live #rowStatus, labelled controls, PCA SVG role=img + aria-label, header/footer landmarks.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: index.html status region + SVG aria-label in renderProjection

followUpGoals.goal: Add an arctic-embed-v2 multi-model demo pairing it with the mmarco-reranker for a full multilingual retrieve-then-rerank pipeline (embedder shortlist → cross-encoder precision), both Apache-2.0.

summary: Revision-1 build+matrix pass for arctic-embed-v2 (Snowflake/snowflake-arctic-embed-m-v2.0 — Snowflake's second-generation multilingual retriever on the GTE-multilingual backbone, 768-d, ~50 languages, 8192-token context, Matryoshka; distinct from the built arctic-embed-s which is v1 English BERT 384-d; Apache-2.0). Real in-browser WASM embed verified in headless Chrome on the actual page: a 768-d cross-language cosine matrix with diagonal 1.00, EN↔FR battery paraphrase 0.91, unrelated 0.12 (496 ms, 0 console errors). Standalone cross-check (cls pooling): EN-paraphrase 0.776, EN↔ES 0.739, unrelated 0.230 — related >> unrelated. Matryoshka truncation (768→64 with re-normalize) and the 'query: ' retrieval prefix are wired and exercised in the see-inside + wild demos. Fresh-profile Download (~310 MB) + auto-init (no Load button) verified; responsive matrix 0px overflow on desktop + mobile, light+dark reviewed. The gte model_type loads fine in the shared transformers.js 3.7.5 pin.
